item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 8min Aidan O'Brien could still supplement Albert Einstein for the Betfred 2,000 Guineas after
item.description: Racing Post @RacingPost · 8min Aidan O'Brien could still supplement Albert Einstein for the Betfred 2,000 Guineas after his third at Newbury on Saturday, but the trainer believes we might not see the best of him until he tackles sprint trips De racingpost.com 2 3 4 872

item.title:
AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 18min Pure horsepower!
Plumpy the pony shows a sparkling turn of foot in the mascot race...
